You need to connect your wallet first.

Claim
Disconnected
No saved wallet
This address will be used for future giveaways if you are eligible.

"The Road to Mainnet" is Presearch's first NFT collection, which is being given out to eligible community members in the lead up to the Presearch Mainnet launch.

You can find eligibility criteria and instructions for claiming at presearch.medium.com/first-presearch-nft-drop-breakdown-8b74d4c1f5cf.

You can view the full collection at opensea.io/collection/the-road-to-mainnet.

Need some help?

Visit docs.presearch.org/nfts/the-road-to-mainnet to see NFT minting instruction and compatibile web3 wallets list.
